title: Remediate Message - Agari Phishing Defense
content:
Remediates a given message id.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Agari pack (AgariPhishingDefense, partner-supported).

Inputs — id: Id of message to remediate.; auto_remediation: Flag for whether to automatically remediate or not.; remediate_action: Action for remediation..

Integrations/scripts used: apd-remediate-message.
raw_yaml:
id: Remediate Message - Agari Phishing Defense
version: -1
name: Remediate Message - Agari Phishing Defense
description: Remediates a given message id.
starttaskid: "0"

      type: condition
      iscommand: false
      brand: ""
    nexttasks:
      '#default#':
      - "5"
      "yes":
      - "4"
    separatecontext: false
    conditions:
    - label: "yes"
      condition:
      - - operator: isTrue
          left:

      description: Is Agari Phishing Defense Integration Enable?
      type: condition
      iscommand: false
      brand: ""
    nexttasks:
      '#default#':
      - "2"
      "yes":
      - "1"
    separatecontext: false
    conditions:
    - label: "yes"
      condition:
      - - operator: isExists
          left:
            value:
              complex:
                root: modules
                filters:
                - - operator: isEqualString
                    left:
                      value:
                        simple: modules.brand
                      iscontext: true
                    right:
                      value:
                        simple: Agari Phishing Defense
                - - operator: isEqualString
                    left:
                      value:
                        simple: modules.state
                      iscontext: true
                    right:
                      value:
                        simple: active
                accessor: brand
            iscontext: true

      }
    }
  }
inputs:
- key: id
  value:
    complex:
      root: incident
      accessor: apdinternalmessageid
  required: true
  description: Id of message to remediate.
  playbookInputQuery:
- key: auto_remediation
  value:
    simple: "true"
  required: false
  description: Flag for whether to automatically remediate or not.
  playbookInputQuery:
- key: remediate_action
  value:
    simple: move
  required: false
  description: Action for remediation.
  playbookInputQuery:
outputs: []
tests:
- AgariPhishingDefense-Test
fromversion: 5.0.0
